attributes.net.peer.name: postgres
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT users.id, users.email, users.hashed_password, users.display_name, users.created_at, users.is_active 
FROM users 
WHERE users.id = $1::UUID

attributes.net.peer.name: postgres
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT tasks.id, tasks.project_id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.assignee_id, tasks.due_date, tasks.created_at, tasks.updated_at 
FROM tasks 
WHERE tasks.id = $1::UUID

attributes.net.peer.name: postgres
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT tasks_1.id AS tasks_1_id, tags.id AS tags_id, tags.name AS tags_name, tags.color AS tags_color 
FROM tasks AS tasks_1 JOIN task_tags AS task_tags_1 ON tasks_1.id = task_tags_1.task_id JOIN tags ON tags.id = task_tags_1.tag_id 
WHERE tasks_1.id IN ($1::UUID)

attributes.net.peer.name: postgres
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT comments.task_id AS comments_task_id, comments.id AS comments_id, comments.author_id AS comments_author_id, comments.content AS comments_content, comments.created_at AS comments_created_at 
FROM comments 
WHERE comments.task_id IN ($1::UUID) ORDER BY comments.created_at

attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:

attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:

attributes.net.peer.name: postgres
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement: INSERT INTO tasks (id, project_id, title, description, status, priority, assignee_id, due_date) VALUES ($1::UUID, $2::UUID, $3::VARCHAR, $4::VARCHAR, $5::task_status, $6::INTEGER, $7::UUID, $8::TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE) RETURNING tasks.created_at, tasks.updated_at

attributes.net.peer.name: postgres
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT tasks.id, tasks.project_id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.assignee_id, tasks.due_date, tasks.created_at, tasks.updated_at 
FROM tasks 
WHERE tasks.id = $1::UUID

attributes.net.peer.name: postgres
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT users.id, users.email, users.hashed_password, users.display_name, users.created_at, users.is_active 
FROM users 
WHERE users.id = $1::UUID

attributes.net.peer.name: postgres
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement: INSERT INTO projects (id, name, description, owner_id) VALUES ($1::UUID, $2::VARCHAR, $3::VARCHAR, $4::UUID) RETURNING projects.created_at

attributes.net.peer.name: postgres
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT projects.id, projects.name, projects.description, projects.owner_id, projects.created_at 
FROM projects 
WHERE projects.id = $1::UUID

attributes.net.peer.name: postgres
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT users.id, users.email, users.hashed_password, users.display_name, users.created_at, users.is_active 
FROM users 
WHERE users.email = $1::VARCHAR
